narrative:
Bethlehem (precinct in Coshocton County) has 764 registered voters, with 44.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
